personal.name: Dipen Chhatrola
personal.role: Software Developer · React.js · Microsoft Power Platform
personal.tagline: I turn complex business requirements into intuitive, scalable solutions.
personal.summary: Results-driven Software Developer with 1+ year of hands-on experience building scalable web applications using React.js, Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI), and Laravel. I translate complex business requirements into intuitive low-code/no-code solutions that streamline operations and boost productivity, with a strong foundation in frontend development, UI/UX principles, and agile methodologies.
personal.availability: Open to Software, Frontend, Power Platform & Data Analytics roles

story.title: The Foundation
story.subtitle: BCA at Atmiya University
story.description: It began at Atmiya University, Rajkot, where the fundamentals of computing turned into a fascination with building for the web. The first lines of code became a habit that never broke.

story.title: Going Deeper
story.subtitle: M.Sc. IT + the React leap
story.description: While pursuing my Master's in Information Technology, I committed to React.js and modern frontend development — building real interfaces instead of just studying them.

story.title: Into Production
story.subtitle: React.js Developer → Data Analyst
story.description: At Imbuesoft I shipped responsive single-page applications with React.js, then moved to Ace Software Exports as a Junior Data Analyst — turning raw data into insights that informed real business decisions.

story.title: Low-Code Velocity
story.subtitle: Microsoft Power Platform
story.description: At Torridwave Technologies I build Canvas and Model-Driven Power Apps, automate workflows with Power Automate, and surface real-time intelligence with Power BI — delivering measurable business value fast.

experience.summary: Built low-code/no-code business solutions on the Microsoft Power Platform, from Canvas apps to automated flows and BI dashboards.
experience.impact: Streamlined internal business workflows and reduced manual data entry by an estimated 30% with Power Apps and Power Automate.
achievements: Designed and deployed Canvas and Model-Driven Power Apps, reducing manual data entry by an estimated 30%.
Engineered Power Automate flows that eliminated bottlenecks and boosted productivity across cross-functional departments.
Integrated Dataverse as the backend data layer, ensuring data consistency, scalability, and compliance.
Collaborated with stakeholders to translate complex requirements into efficient low-code designs on tight timelines.
Built interactive Power BI dashboards surfacing real-time business intelligence for management teams.
Leveraged SharePoint for document management and collaboration, improving information accessibility.

experience.summary: Owned the data pipeline from collection and cleaning through analysis and visualization for business reporting.
experience.impact: Improved data quality standards to reduce reporting errors and automated repetitive processing to cut analysis cycle time.
achievements: Collected, cleaned, and validated large datasets to ensure accuracy and integrity, reducing reporting errors.
Performed exploratory data analysis (EDA) to uncover trends and actionable insights for business strategy.
Developed data visualization reports that let stakeholders interpret complex data through clear dashboards.
Automated repetitive data processing tasks, freeing capacity for higher-value analytical work.
Delivered on-time reporting aligned with business KPIs in collaboration with cross-functional teams.

experience.summary: Developed dynamic, responsive single-page applications with React.js for seamless desktop and mobile experiences.
experience.impact: Built a reusable component architecture that improved maintainability and reduced development time for new features.
achievements: Developed responsive SPAs with React.js, delivering seamless UX across desktop and mobile devices.
Built reusable React components with a clean architecture, cutting development time for new features.
Integrated RESTful APIs for real-time data rendering and interactive user interfaces.
Implemented pixel-perfect designs with Bootstrap 5 alongside UI/UX designers, ensuring cross-browser compatibility.
Participated in code reviews and agile sprint ceremonies, contributing to continuous delivery.

projects.name: Power Apps Business Process Automation Suite
projects.problem: Approval workflows, inventory tracking, and employee onboarding ran on manual forms and scattered spreadsheets.
projects.challenge: Automate end-to-end business processes with low-code tooling while keeping data consistent and reporting real-time.
projects.solution: A suite of Canvas and Model-Driven Power Apps automating approvals, inventory, and onboarding, with Power Automate flows triggered on form submissions.
projects.implementation: Built on Power Apps with Dataverse as the data layer, Power Automate for workflow automation, SharePoint for document management, and Power BI for consolidated KPI dashboards.
projects.results: Reduced manual form processing time by approximately 40% and delivered a single real-time management reporting view across multiple data sources.

projects.name: React.js Dynamic Web Application
projects.problem: The product needed a fast, modular frontend that rendered live data and worked consistently across every device and browser.
projects.challenge: Architect a component-based SPA that stayed maintainable while feature modules kept growing.
projects.solution: A modular React.js single-page application with dynamic data rendering via REST API integration and fully responsive layouts.
projects.implementation: Built with React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), and Bootstrap 5, structured around a reusable component library with clean separation of concerns.
projects.results: Improved page load performance, achieved consistent UX across screen sizes, and reduced feature development time for subsequent modules by an estimated 25%.

projects.name: Data Analytics & Visualization Dashboard
projects.problem: Stakeholders couldn't monitor business metrics without waiting on manual, error-prone reporting cycles.
projects.challenge: Build an end-to-end pipeline from raw data ingestion to polished dashboards that non-technical users could read at a glance.
projects.solution: An analytics pipeline covering data ingestion, cleaning, analysis, and final visualization dashboards for business reporting.
projects.implementation: Combined SQL and Excel for data preparation with Power BI for interactive dashboards monitoring real-time metrics and trends.
projects.results: Enabled stakeholders to track metrics in real time, supporting faster and more informed decision-making.

education.detail: Advanced study in software systems, web technologies, and application architecture.
Foundations in programming, databases, and computer science fundamentals.

achievements.label: Manual Processing Cut
achievements.description: Form processing time reduced via Power Automate flows.

achievements.label: Data Entry Reduced
achievements.description: Manual data entry eliminated with Power Apps solutions.

achievements.label: Faster Feature Delivery
achievements.description: Dev time saved through a reusable React component library.

philosophy.title: Understand the Business First
philosophy.description: Great software starts with listening. I work with stakeholders to understand the real process before choosing the tool — whether that's React, Laravel, or a low-code Power App.

philosophy.title: Automate the Repetitive
philosophy.description: Every manual form, copy-paste, and repeated report is an opportunity. Automating it frees people for higher-value work — and removes errors at the source.

philosophy.title: Let the Data Decide
philosophy.description: From cleaning raw datasets to building Power BI dashboards, I believe decisions should be driven by clear, trustworthy, real-time data — not guesswork.

philosophy.title: Build Reusable Foundations
philosophy.description: Reusable React components and clean architecture cut feature development time and make every subsequent module faster to ship.
